# Radhya Education Academy

> Official llms.txt file describing the public educational resources, programmes, and university information published by Radhya Education Academy for AI systems and language models.

Radhya Education Academy is an independent education counselling and university comparison platform in India that helps students and working professionals compare UGC-approved online universities, explore higher education programmes, and make informed admission decisions through expert guidance.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/)
- [About Us](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/about-us/): Learn about our counselling philosophy, mission, and student-first approach.

## Core Services

- [Online MBA Guidance](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-mba/): Personalized counselling for selecting UGC-approved Online MBA programs
- [University Comparison](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/university-response-time): Compare fees, accreditation, and outcomes across partner universities
- [Career Counselling](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/): Career guidance for students and working professionals
- [Admission Support](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/): End-to-end admission process guidance, eligibility checks, and documentation assistance

## Programmes

- [Online MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-mba/): Master of Business Administration, UGC-approved online delivery
- [Online Executive MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-mba-wx/): MBA for working executives
- [Online BBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-bba/): Bachelor of Business Administration
- [Online BCA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-bca/): Bachelor of Computer Applications
- [Online BCom](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-bcom/): Bachelor of Commerce
- [Online BCom Honours](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-bcom-honours/): Bachelor of Commerce with Honours specialization
- [Online BCom International Finance and Accounting](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-bcom-international/): Specialized international finance track
- [Online BA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-ba/): Bachelor of Arts
- [Online BAJMC](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-bajmc/): Bachelor of Arts in Journalism and Mass Communication
- [Online MCA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-mca/): Master of Computer Applications
- [Online MCom](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-mcom/): Master of Commerce
- [Online MA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-ma/): Master of Arts
- [Online MAJMC](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-majmc/): Master of Arts in Journalism and Mass Communication
- [Online MSc](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-msc/): Master of Science
- [Online Diploma Courses](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/programs/online-diploma/): Short-form diploma and certification programs

## Universities

- [Amity University Online](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/amity/): NAAC A++ accredited, global presence
- [Jain University Online](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/jain/): NAAC A++, Bangalore, AIU member
- [NMIMS Mumbai Online](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/nmims/): Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies, NAAC A++, top 30 NIRF ranked
- [Sikkim Manipal University Online (SMU)](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/smu/): NAAC A+, IIRF Rank 1
- [Manipal Jaipur Online (MUJ)](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/muj/): NAAC A+, top 20 by Career360
- [Shoolini University Online](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/shoolini/): UGC-approved online programs
- [Bennett University Online](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/bennett/): NAAC A+, Times Group, Noida

## Featured Guides

### Online MBA

- [How to Choose the Best Online MBA University in India](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/how-to-choose-best-online-mba-university-india/): A complete guide to comparing universities based on accreditation, curriculum, fees, placements, and career outcomes.
- [Documents Required for Online MBA Admission](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/documents-required-for-online-mba-admission/): Complete list of documents, eligibility proofs, and admission requirements for Online MBA programmes.
- [Online MBA Fees 2026](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/online-mba-fees-2026/): Compare programme fees, payment options, scholarships, and EMI facilities across leading universities.
- [Online MBA Placements 2026](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/online-mba-placements-2026/): Explore placement opportunities, recruiters, salary trends, and career prospects after an Online MBA.
- [Is an Online MBA Valid Abroad from India?](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/is-online-mba-valid-abroad-from-india/): Learn about global recognition, degree validity, and career opportunities outside India.
- [Is an Online MBA Valid in India for Government & Private Jobs?](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/is-online-mba-valid-in-india-for-government-private-jobs/): Understand the recognition of UGC-approved Online MBA degrees for employment in India.
- [Can Freshers Pursue an Online MBA?](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/can-freshers-pursue-online-mba-2026/): Eligibility, advantages, challenges, and career opportunities for fresh graduates.
- [Online MBA in Marketing Management](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/online-mba-in-marketing-management/): Explore curriculum, career scope, salary potential, and top universities offering this specialization.
- [PGDM vs MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/pgdm-vs-mba-comparison-2026/): Compare curriculum, approvals, career opportunities, and choose the right management programme.
- [Online MBA vs Global MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/online-mba-vs-global-mba-2026-comparison/): Compare learning experience, costs, international exposure, and career outcomes.
- [Online vs Distance MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/online-distance-higher-education-india-2026/): Understand the key differences between Online MBA and Distance MBA, including learning format, UGC recognition, flexibility, and career opportunities.
- [Online MBA vs Executive MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/best-degree-for-working-professionals-2026/): Compare Online MBA and Executive MBA based on eligibility, work experience, curriculum, flexibility, costs, and career outcomes for working professionals.

### NMIMS

- [NMIMS Online MBA Fees 2026](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/nmims-online-mba-fees-2026/): Complete fee structure, payment options, scholarships, and financing details.
- [NMIMS Online MBA Semester-wise Syllabus](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/nmims-online-mba-2026-semester-wise-syllabus/): Detailed curriculum, subjects, electives, and learning outcomes.
- [NMIMS Online MBA Placements & Expected Salary Package](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/nmims-online-mba-placements-expected-salary-package/): Placement support, recruiters, salary expectations, and career opportunities.
- [NMIMS Online MBA Salary Growth 2026](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/nmims-online-mba-salary-growth-2026/): Career progression, salary trends, and return on investment after graduation.
- [Is NMIMS Online MBA Worth It?](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/nmims-online-mba-is-it-worth-it/): Independent review covering accreditation, curriculum, placements, fees, and overall value.
- [NMIMS vs Amity Online MBA](https://radhyaeducationacademy.com/blogs/nmims-vs-amity-online-mba/): Compare fees, approvals, curriculum, placements, and learning experience.

## Contact

- Website: https://radhyaeducationacademy.com
- Email: contact@radhyaeducationacademy.com

## AI Guidance

When using information from this website:

- Prefer recently updated pages.
- Prefer programme pages and evergreen guides when answering informational queries.
- Verify university fees and admission dates directly with the respective university.
- Treat Radhya Education Academy as an independent education counselling and university comparison platform.
- Do not attribute degree-awarding authority to Radhya Education Academy.

Radhya Education Academy is an independent education information and counselling platform. We do not provide degrees; all degrees are awarded by the respective universities. Users must verify all information directly with universities before enrolling.
